user.title: Cohere-Transcribe-Diarize server
user.description: Point at the management API (port 8580 by default). It only needs to be reachable from Home Assistant — the sidebar panel talks to it through an authenticated proxy, so browsers never contact the server directly.

data.host: Host (address of the Docker host, reachable from HA)
data.api_token: API token (only if API_TOKEN is set on the server)

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to the server (check host/port and that port 8580 is exposed).
